home.sub: Real OSRM routes, a vibrant traveler community, and live alerts — all in one place.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need on the road
home.f1: OSRM-powered routes with traffic-aware ETAs and multiple alternatives.
home.f2: Travel stories, tips and route discussions from journey-verified members.
home.f3: Booking confirmations, schedule changes and journey reminders — multi-language.
home.aboutText: RouteNest was born out of a simple idea: making bus travel smarter, safer, and more connected. We believe that the best journeys are the ones shared with others. That's why we combined advanced real-time routing with a community-driven platform where travelers can share their stories, tips, and honest reviews.

planner.title: Route Planner

planner.noRoutes: Enter a start and destination to generate routes.
